item.title: Time-pressure decision scenario | hvac replacement in a move-in-ready listing | offer reduction with Project Price estimate ranges

item.description: Project Price short-form video: Time-pressure decision scenario | hvac replacement in a move-in-ready listing | offer reduction with Project Price estimate ranges. Realtor-led buyer guidance with immediate estimate ranges and repair negotiation context.
